C0600 Staff to Conduct Brief Interview for Mental Status CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether or not a staff assessment for mental status should be performed. -=Not assessed/no information
 0 =No (resident was able to complete interview)
 1 =Yes (resident was unable to complete interview)
^=Blank(skip pattern)
